scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; if [ -n "$npm_config_user_agent" ]; then case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*|corepack/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; elif command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then :; else echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1; fi'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
